label: Parallel Ensemble
description: Independent review prompts run in parallel and are merged by a final combiner prompt.

stages.label: Stage 1
stages.purpose: Find correctness risks in the supplied change set.

stages.label: Stage 2
stages.purpose: Review test coverage and regression risk.

stages.label: Stage 4
stages.purpose: Review performance, scale, and resource usage concerns.

stages.label: Stage 5
stages.purpose: Review maintainability, design, and developer experience concerns.

stages.label: Stage 6
stages.purpose: Review documentation, clarity, and communication quality.

combineStage.label: Combine
combineStage.purpose: Merge the parallel analyses into a single CCR.md report.
